title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART M-1. INSURANCE REGULATORY SANDBOX ACT

§1430.1. Short title

            This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Insurance Regulatory Sandbox Act".

            Acts 2024, No. 229, §1, eff. May 23, 2024.

SUBPART M-1.  INSURANCE REGULATORY SANDBOX ACT
§1430.1.  Short title
This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Insurance Regulatory Sandbox
Act".
Acts 2024, No. 229, §1, eff. May 23, 2024.
